trainingNotes: Razz standard betting DQN trained in a synthetic Stud-family bootstrap environment with teacher warmup, fixture replay, and action masking. This model covers value bet, pressure-fold, pot-odds continue, Razz low-strength, and Stud8 scoop-potential fixtures. It is intended as a playable Beginner/Standard CPU surface for 8Game/10Game routing, not as a Pro-strength or human-verified model. Replace or re-gate after Stud/Razz progression audits and hand-history benchmark data.

Advanced-gated PLO8 standard board-betting DQN trained in a synthetic board-game environment with teacher warmup, advanced fixture replay, and action masking. The current gate covers thin value, bluff discipline, multiway isolation, side-pot EV, and PLO8 scoop/no-low awareness where applicable. This is a bootstrap model for live CPU routing and must be replaced after hand-history/human-practice evaluation.

6-max open-spot/range-equity checkpoint selected for Pro. 7-profile x 2-seed checkpoint gate: avgReward 2.307, showdownWinRate 0.674, foldRate 0.159, Standard v3 delta +0.911. This is a synthetic RL gate result, not a verified 60%+ win rate against human players. Not promoted to Iron because negative raise-EV actions remain high.

Trained 6-max Iron checkpoint selected from the draw-quality/final-fold-discipline 20k run. Re-evaluated 2026-05-05 vs Pro v2 on 7 profiles x 2 seeds x 120 episodes: avgReward 3.043 vs 2.987 (+0.057), showdownWinRate 0.731 vs 0.706, worstProfileAvgReward 2.209 vs 2.130, profitableFoldMisses 1 vs 13, negativeRaiseEVActions 12 vs 108. Practice-only Iron benchmark still fails the strict foldRate gate (0.204 > 0.18) and humanVerified=false; do not claim human-verified Iron strength until 50+ real hand logs pass.

Bootstrap heuristic ONNX used to exercise the frontend ONNX path. Not validated as world-class or clearly stronger than human players; replace after full 6-max and human/practice benchmark gates pass.

5k 6-max teacher-supervised brush-up with first-in value bet replay, profitable continue replay, and mixed opponent profiles. Selected 2.5k checkpoint for Standard because it beats Standard v2 on 6-profile x 2-seed gate: avgReward 3.008 vs 1.902, worstProfileAvgReward 2.202 vs 1.064, negativeBetEVActions 0 vs 28. It is near Pro v1 on avgReward but not promoted to Pro because minAvgReward is still lower than Pro v1.
Trained with future street value and cheap developing draw continuation shaping. 7-profile gate recommended standard tier; not promoted above standard.
Retained for historical comparison only. Do not route to live CPU; trained before the current positive shaping cap fix.
Retained for offline comparison only. Normal beginner CPU falls back to the non-DQN policy until a current-env beginner-strength model is trained.

Current-env 2-7/A-5 draw-family DQN for beginner 2-7 lowball. Trained 3k episodes with beginner/loose opponent profiles, teacher warmup, fixture replay, and imitation pretrain. Intended for approachable D01/S01 CPUs; not promoted above beginner without human/practice gate.

Current-env 2-7 draw DQN for standard D01/S01 CPUs. Trained 5k episodes against beginner/standard/tight/loose/aggressive profiles with teacher warmup, fixture replay, and imitation support. Last 500 episode reward moved positive; still requires human/practice benchmark before higher tiers.

Current-env A-5 draw-family DQN for beginner D02/S02 CPUs. Trained 3k episodes with beginner/loose opponent profiles, teacher warmup, fixture replay, and imitation pretrain. Intended as a basic playable A-5 policy, not a high-tier model.
A-5 Triple Draw専用モデル（D02のみ）。DualAgentDrawLowballEnv self-playで累計25kエピソード学習、avg_reward=0.53。S02（A-5 SD）はプリドローレンジが別物のため未学習・別途立て直し予定。

Current-env 2-7 draw DQN for Pro D01/S01 CPUs. Trained 2.5k episodes against standard/tight/aggressive profiles with teacher warmup, imitation pretrain, fixture replay, and low exploration floor. This clears the draw ONNX fixture gate and is the first Pro routing checkpoint; it still needs 20k+ checkpoint comparison and human/practice benchmark before promotion to Iron/WorldMaster.

Current-env A-5 draw DQN for Pro D02/S02 CPUs. Trained 2.5k episodes against standard/tight/aggressive profiles with teacher warmup, imitation pretrain, fixture replay, and low exploration floor. This clears the draw ONNX fixture gate and is the first Pro routing checkpoint; it still needs 20k+ checkpoint comparison and human/practice benchmark before promotion to Iron/WorldMaster.
Teacher-initialized draw bootstrap ONNX. This is not a full self-play RL checkpoint; replace after variant-specific draw RL and human/practice gates pass.
Teacher-initialized draw bootstrap ONNX. This is not a full self-play RL checkpoint; replace after variant-specific draw RL and human/practice gates pass.

Self-play DQN for 2-7 Triple Draw / Single Draw. Trained with DualAgentDrawLowballEnv — both seats use DQN policies with periodic opponent freeze and call_buffer / fold_buffer margin shaping. variantIds is intentionally empty until human/practice benchmark passes; deploy by adding ["D01","S01"] and re-running export_draw_dqn_onnx.py with --model-id model-27draw-selfplay-v1.

Self-play DQN for A-5 Triple Draw / Single Draw. Trained with DualAgentDrawLowballEnv — both seats use DQN policies with periodic opponent freeze and call_buffer / fold_buffer margin shaping. variantIds is intentionally empty until human/practice benchmark passes; deploy by adding ["D02","S02"] and re-running export_draw_dqn_onnx.py with --model-id model-a5draw-selfplay-v1.
